en: And he left there and went to the region of Judea and beyond the Jordan, and crowds gathered to him again. And again, as was his custom, he taught them.
zh: 耶穌從那裡動身，來到約旦河東的猶太境內。許多人又聚集到他那裡，他像平常一樣教導他們。

en: And Pharisees came up and in order to test him asked, "Is it lawful for a man to divorce his wife?"
zh: 有法利賽人前來試探耶穌，問他：“丈夫可以休妻嗎？”

en: He answered them, "What did Moses command you?"
zh: 耶穌回答：“摩西吩咐你們的是甚麼呢？”

en: They said, "Moses allowed a man to write a certificate of divorce and to send her away."
zh: 他們說：“摩西准許‘人寫了休書就可以休妻’。”

en: And Jesus said to them, "Because of your hardness of heart he wrote you this commandment.
zh: 耶穌說：“因為你們的心硬，摩西才寫這條例給你們。

en: But from the beginning of creation, 'God made them male and female.'
zh: 但從起初創造的時候， 神是‘造男造女’。

en: 'Therefore a man shall leave his father and mother and hold fast to his wife,
zh: ‘因此人要離開父母，與妻子連合，

en: and they shall become one flesh.' So they are no longer two but one flesh.
zh: 二人成為一體了。’這樣，他們不再是兩個人，而是一體的了。

en: What therefore God has joined together, let not man separate."
zh: 所以 神所配合的，人不可分開。”

en: And in the house the disciples asked him again about this matter.
zh: 回到屋子裡，門徒再提起這件事來問他。

en: And he said to them, "Whoever divorces his wife and marries another commits adultery against her,
zh: 他對他們說：“誰休妻另娶，誰就是犯姦淫，得罪了妻子。

en: and if she divorces her husband and marries another, she commits adultery."
zh: 如果妻子棄夫另嫁，也是犯了姦淫。”

en: And they were bringing children to him that he might touch them, and the disciples rebuked them.
zh: 有人帶著小孩子到耶穌跟前，要他觸摸他們；門徒卻責備那些人。

en: But when Jesus saw it, he was indignant and said to them, "Let the children come to me; do not hinder them, for to such belongs the kingdom of God.
zh: 耶穌看見了就生氣，對門徒說：“讓小孩子到我這裡來，不要禁止他們，因為 神的國是屬於這樣的人的。

en: Truly, I say to you, whoever does not receive the kingdom of God like a child shall not enter it."
zh: 我實在告訴你們，凡是不像小孩子一樣接受 神的國的，絕對不能進去。”

en: And he took them in his arms and blessed them, laying his hands on them.
zh: 於是耶穌把小孩子抱起來，為他們按手祝福。

en: And as he was setting out on his journey, a man ran up and knelt before him and asked him, "Good Teacher, what must I do to inherit eternal life?"
zh: 耶穌又開始他的行程。那時，有一個人跑過來，跪在他面前，問他說：“良善的老師，我當作甚麼，才可以承受永生？”

en: And Jesus said to him, "Why do you call me good? No one is good except God alone.
zh: 耶穌對他說：“你為甚麼稱我是良善的？除了 神一位以外，沒有良善的。

en: You know the commandments: 'Do not murder, Do not commit adultery, Do not steal, Do not bear false witness, Do not defraud, Honor your father and mother.'"
zh: 誡命你是知道的：不可殺人，不可姦淫，不可偷盜，不可作假證供，不可欺詐，當孝敬父母。”

en: And he said to him, "Teacher, all these I have kept from my youth."
zh: 他對耶穌說：“老師，這一切我從小都遵守了。”

en: And Jesus, looking at him, loved him, and said to him, "You lack one thing: go, sell all that you have and give to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven; and come, follow me."
zh: 耶穌看著他，就愛他，對他說：“你還缺少一件：去變賣你所有的，分給窮人，就必定有財寶在天上，而且你要來跟從我。”

en: Disheartened by the saying, he went away sorrowful, for he had great possessions.
zh: 那人聽見這話，就變了臉色，憂憂愁愁地走了，因為他的財產很多。

en: And Jesus looked around and said to his disciples, "How difficult it will be for those who have wealth to enter the kingdom of God!"
zh: 耶穌周圍觀看，對門徒說：“富有的人要進 神的國，是多麼難哪！”

en: And the disciples were amazed at his words. But Jesus said to them again, "Children, how difficult it is to enter the kingdom of God!
zh: 門徒都希奇他的話，耶穌又對他們說：“孩子們哪， 要進 神的國，是多麼困難！

en: It is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for a rich person to enter the kingdom of God."
zh: 駱駝穿過針眼，比有錢的人進 神的國還容易呢！”

en: And they were exceedingly astonished, and said to him, "Then who can be saved?"
zh: 門徒就更加驚奇，彼此說：“這樣，誰可以得救呢？”

en: Jesus looked at them and said, "With man it is impossible, but not with God. For all things are possible with God."
zh: 耶穌看著他們，說：“在人不能，在 神卻不然，因為在 神凡事都能。”

en: Peter began to say to him, "See, we have left everything and followed you."
zh: 彼得對他說：“你看，我們已經捨棄了一切，而且來跟從你了。”

en: Jesus said, "Truly, I say to you, there is no one who has left house or brothers or sisters or mother or father or children or lands, for my sake and for the gospel,
zh: 耶穌說：“我實在告訴你們，人為著我和福音捨棄了房屋、弟兄、姊妹、母親、父親、兒女、田地，

en: who will not receive a hundredfold now in this time, houses and brothers and sisters and mothers and children and lands, with persecutions, and in the age to come eternal life.
zh: 沒有不在今生得百倍─就是房屋、弟兄、姊妹、母親、兒女、田地，同時要受迫害─在來世還要得永生。

en: But many who are first will be last, and the last first."
zh: 然而許多在前的將要在後，在後的將要在前。”

en: And they were on the road, going up to Jerusalem, and Jesus was walking ahead of them. And they were amazed, and those who followed were afraid. And taking the twelve again, he began to tell them what was to happen to him,
zh: 在上耶路撒冷的路途中，耶穌走在前面，門徒希奇，跟從的人也害怕。耶穌又把十二門徒帶到一邊，把自己將要遭遇的事告訴他們，

en: saying, "See, we are going up to Jerusalem, and the Son of Man will be delivered over to the chief priests and the scribes, and they will condemn him to death and deliver him over to the Gentiles.
zh: 說：“我們現在上耶路撒冷去，人子要被交給祭司長和經學家，他們要定他的罪，並且把他交給外族人。

en: And they will mock him and spit on him, and flog him and kill him. And after three days he will rise."
zh: 他們要凌辱他，向他吐唾沫，鞭打他，殺害他，三天以後，他要復活。”

en: And James and John, the sons of Zebedee, came up to him and said to him, "Teacher, we want you to do for us whatever we ask of you."
zh: 西庇太的兒子雅各、約翰，來到耶穌跟前，對他說：“老師，我們無論向你求甚麼，願你為我們作成。”

en: And he said to them, "What do you want me to do for you?"
zh: 耶穌說：“要我為你們作甚麼？”

en: And they said to him, "Grant us to sit, one at your right hand and one at your left, in your glory."
zh: 他們說：“在你的榮耀裡，讓我們一個坐在你的右邊，一個坐在你的左邊。”

en: Jesus said to them, "You do not know what you are asking. Are you able to drink the cup that I drink, or to be baptized with the baptism with which I am baptized?"
zh: 耶穌說：“你們不知道你們求的是甚麼。我喝的杯，你們能喝嗎？我受的洗，你們能受嗎？”

en: And they said to him, "We are able." And Jesus said to them, "The cup that I drink you will drink, and with the baptism with which I am baptized, you will be baptized,
zh: 他們說：“能。”耶穌說：“我喝的杯，你們固然要喝；我受的洗，你們也要受。

en: but to sit at my right hand or at my left is not mine to grant, but it is for those for whom it has been prepared."
zh: 只是坐在我的左右，不是我可以賜的，而是 神預備賜給誰，就賜給誰。”

en: And when the ten heard it, they began to be indignant at James and John.
zh: 其他十個門徒聽見了，就向雅各、約翰生氣。

en: And Jesus called them to him and said to them, "You know that those who are considered rulers of the Gentiles lord it over them, and their great ones exercise authority over them.
zh: 耶穌把他們叫過來，對他們說：“你們知道各國都有被尊為元首的統治他們，也有官長管轄他們。

en: But it shall not be so among you. But whoever would be great among you must be your servant,
zh: 但你們中間卻不要這樣；誰想在你們中間為大的，就要作你們的僕役，

en: and whoever would be first among you must be slave of all.
zh: 誰想在你們中間為首的，就要作大家的奴僕。

en: For even the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life as a ransom for many."
zh: 因為人子來，不是要受人服事，而是要服事人，並且要捨命，作許多人的贖價。”

en: And they came to Jericho. And as he was leaving Jericho with his disciples and a great crowd, Bartimaeus, a blind beggar, the son of Timaeus, was sitting by the roadside.
zh: 他們進了耶利哥。耶穌、門徒和一大群人從耶利哥出來的時候，有一個瞎眼的人，是底買的兒子，名叫巴底買，坐在路旁討飯。

en: And when he heard that it was Jesus of Nazareth, he began to cry out and say, "Jesus, Son of David, have mercy on me!"
zh: 他聽見是拿撒勒人耶穌，就喊叫，說：“大衛的子孫耶穌啊，可憐我吧！”

en: And many rebuked him, telling him to be silent. But he cried out all the more, "Son of David, have mercy on me!"
zh: 許多人斥責他，叫他不要出聲；他卻更加放聲喊叫：“大衛的子孫啊，可憐我吧！”

en: And Jesus stopped and said, "Call him." And they called the blind man, saying to him, "Take heart. Get up; he is calling you."
zh: 耶穌就站住，說：“把他叫過來。”他們就叫那瞎眼的人，對他說：“放心吧，起來，他叫你了。”

en: And throwing off his cloak, he sprang up and came to Jesus.
zh: 他就丟下衣服，跳起來，走到耶穌那裡。

en: And Jesus said to him, "What do you want me to do for you?" And the blind man said to him, "Rabbi, let me recover my sight."
zh: 耶穌對他說：“你要我為你作甚麼呢？”瞎眼的人對他說：“拉波尼，我要能看見。”

en: And Jesus said to him, "Go your way; your faith has made you well." And immediately he recovered his sight and followed him on the way.
zh: 耶穌說：“去吧，你的信使你痊愈了。”他立刻看見了，就在路上跟隨耶穌。
